sqlMap.select: select l.LimitSequence,PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount from BrokerageLimits l

select PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.AggregateLimit),1),2) +'/' +PARSENAME(Convert(varchar,Convert(money,l.OccuranceLimit),1),2) as LimitAmount,l.LimitSequence from Limits l where CoverageKey=#CoverageKey# and l.AggregateLimit <= 5000000 and l.OccuranceLimit <= 5000000 and LimitSequence not in (39,42,43)
sqlMap.insert: insert into Limits(AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, CoverageKey LimitCode LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp StateCode LimitSequence ) values (#AggregateLimit:NUMERIC#, #OccuranceLimit:NUMERIC#, #CoverageKey:NUMERIC# #LimitCode# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #StateCode# #LimitSequence# )
sqlMap.select: select AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, LimitCode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, StateCode, LimitSequence, CoverageKey from Limits where AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
sqlMap.update:
update Limits set
LimitCode = #LimitCode# LimitCode = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null StateCode = #StateCode# StateCode = null LimitSequence = #LimitSequence# LimitSequence = null
where AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from Limits where AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
sqlMap.select: select AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, LimitCode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, StateCode, LimitSequence, CoverageKey from Limits where AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# and OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# and CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
select AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, CoverageKey, LimitCode, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, StateCode, LimitSequence from Limits where CoverageKey = #CoverageKey#
